description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a muted blue fabric, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The sofa has three distinct seat and back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached to the frame. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend at the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a clean, geometric profile. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and made of wood, positioned at the corners for stability and a subtle mid-century touch. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern blue three-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform attached cushions, and short wooden legs. The design is minimalist and boxy, with smooth, solid upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, straight armrest, and the thickness of the backrest and seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned back panel and the wooden legs at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and three matching attached back cushions, all evenly spaced and flush with the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered wooden legs positioned at each corner, exposed and angled outward for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest divided into three equal segments, each corresponding to a seat cushion, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
